description_long: This is a sleek, full-size black keyboard featuring a standard QWERTY layout with a dedicated numeric keypad on the right. The keys are low-profile and evenly spaced, with white printed legends for clear visibility. The surface appears to be made of matte plastic, giving it a modern and professional look suitable for office or home environments. The keyboard is thin and lightweight, with a flat profile and no visible wrist rest or additional macro keys. There are no visible cables or wireless receivers attached, suggesting a minimalist design. The overall construction looks sturdy, with a uniform color and no visible branding or decorative elements.
description: A slim, full-size black keyboard with white legends and a numeric keypad, featuring a modern matte plastic finish. The design is minimalist and professional, with low-profile keys and no visible cables.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full key layout, including the QWERTY section and numeric keypad.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the keyboard's thin profile and low-profile keys.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back edge and overall length of the keyboard.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the slimness and key arrangement.
